annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Apply forwarded CLI args to the running editor (layout / screen / preview / create-new). Does not raise the window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Effective screen ID to open on (virtual-screen aware). Empty = keep current.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Layout UUID or autotile: prefix to load. Empty = keep current.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Create a new layout instead of loading one. Mutually exclusive with layoutId.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Open in read-only preview mode. Auto-enabled for autotile: layoutIds.
